CustomField.description:
Please note: The data stored in this field is linked to the HomeKeeper National Data Hub but programs are not required to use this field.
ZIP code of property. If you save a record with the zip filled in, the city and state are filled in automatically.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: ZIP code of property. If you save a record with the zip filled in, the city and state are filled in automatically.
CustomField.label: Zip/Postal Code
